text: GCP Audit Log recorded 3 API call(s) by principal "ci-cd-runner@acme-prod-318919.iam.gserviceaccount.com" from IP 45.83.64.112 between 2026-05-16T02:41:14 and 2026-05-16T02:46:07 UTC. At 2026-05-16T02:41:14, IAM policy on project "projects/acme-prod-318919" was modified to grant role "roles/owner" to serviceAccount:ci-cd-runner@acme-prod-318919.iam.gserviceaccount.com. Granting owner/editor roles to service accounts is a privilege escalation technique (T1078.004 (Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts) / T1098 (Account Manipulation)). At 2026-05-16T02:43:51, the Security Command Center notification config "projects/982144771902/notificationConfigs/high-severity-findings" was updated to remove its Pub/Sub topic (set to empty: ""). Disabling security alert notifications prevents defenders from receiving real-time threat alerts (T1562 (Impair Defenses)). At 2026-05-16T02:46:07, a new key was created for service account "backup-admin@acme-prod-318919.iam.gserviceaccount.com" via curl. Creating service account keys provides persistent, long-lived credentials that bypass MFA (T1078.004 (Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts)). The IAM and security configuration changes from an external IP warrant immediate investigation to determine if this represents unauthorized access.
